title: About
intro: Personal homelab dashboard with glass morphism design. Manage services, Docker containers, media automation, Home Assistant and more — all in one interface. Self-hosted on Unraid as a single Docker container.

install.title: Quick Installation
install.step1: Install via Unraid Community Applications or pull the Docker image directly
install.step3: Set up your admin account (prompted on first launch)
install.step4: Done — configure services, widgets, and integrations
